calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Settlement on the Record.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Francisco Torres, Esq., for Plaintiff: Canon Kip Assoc.
Defendant Willie Dotie present in pro per.
10:30 a.m. Parties present and have reached a settlement by written stipulation.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Essential terms were read into the record as follows:
Stipulation for entry of Judgment or Dismissal with prejudice.
UD and Damages of $3,600.00 by installment of $360.00 starting Feb. 1, 2004 and on the first of each month there after, plus regular rent.
Dismissal with prejucide when paid in full.
Ex parte, 48 hrs. telephone notice, if defendant does not complied with house rules.
Defendant waives: any appeal, stay or execution for entry of Judgment.
All parties agreed to terms of the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Continued To Jan-20-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for plaintiff
Shadow Martin, Manager for plaintiff, Canon Kip Associates, appearing telephonically
Willie Dotie, Defendant in pro per

Unlawful detainer settlement conference held. Case not settled. Trial date maintained.
JPT:Anne Hipshman Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott Not reported. (218)
